description_long: This is a robust, black wristwatch with a metallic link bracelet and a prominent round case. The watch face is black with white hour markers, including bold indices and numerals at the 10, 20, 30, 40, and 50-minute positions, and luminous hands for visibility in low light. The bezel is marked with minute indicators and appears to be rotatable, typical of diver-style watches. The bracelet is composed of solid, glossy metal links, giving the watch a substantial and premium appearance. The case back is smooth and slightly domed, with the clasp integrated into the bracelet. The overall design is sporty and functional, suitable for both casual and formal urban settings.
description: A black metal wristwatch with a link bracelet, bold white markers, and a sporty, diver-style bezel. The design is robust, glossy, and functional.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the detailed watch face, bezel markings, and the start of the metal bracelet.
description_view_1: Rear-left view highlighting the bracelet links and the side profile of the watch case.
description_view_2: Back view focusing on the closed bracelet and the smooth, domed case back.
description_view_3: Front-right view displaying the watch face, bezel, and the right side of the bracelet.
attribute_brand_logo: A small, white rectangular logo is visible on the upper center of the dial, just below the 12 o'clock marker.
attribute_dial_design: The dial is black with bold white indices and numerals at 10-minute intervals, luminous hour and minute hands, and a prominent minute track around the edge. The style is sporty and functional, reminiscent of a diver's watch, with no subdials or decorative patterns.
attribute_strap_type: Metal link bracelet made of stainless steel, featuring solid, glossy links and a secure clasp.
attribute_watch_face_display: Analog display with three central hands (hour, minute, second), luminous elements, and a date window at the 3 o'clock position.
